registry-core-api/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.general_idea: Add null check before iterating over a collection to prevent NullPointerException.
registry-core-api/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.why_exists: Runtime NullPointerException if versions list is null.

registry-core-api/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.general_idea: Change exception superclass from checked Exception to unchecked RuntimeException.
registry-core-api/src/main/java/gr/uoa/d.why_exists: Callers of methods throwing this exception will fail to compile if they do not declare 'throws ResourceNotFoundException' or wrap calls in try-catch blocks, as the exception type has changed from checked to unchecked.
